vocab.meaning: một món kỷ vật/vật gia bảo đầy tình cảm
vocab.example: My grandfather passed down his vintage Rolex to me, making it a sentimental heirloom that I'll cherish forever.

vocab.meaning: đánh dấu một cột mốc quan trọng
vocab.example: My parents gifted me a sophisticated timepiece to mark a milestone when I graduated from university.
The watch features a commemorative engraving on the back, detailing the date of my twenty-first birthday.

vocab.meaning: món quà thay lời cảm ơn/biểu hiện của sự trân trọng
vocab.example: My former employer gave me a sleek wristwatch as a token of appreciation for my five years of service.
The watch I received has a classic allure that never goes out of style, regardless of current fashion trends.
